name: chr19_19q13_33_ZNF_tail_cluster
description: 19q13.33-q13.41 second large KRAB-ZNF cluster (~30 paralogs), telomeric to the q13.31 mega-cluster. Includes ZNF114, ZNF160, ZNF347, ZNF347, ZNF480, ZNF578, ZNF611, ZNF600. Together with the q13.31 cluster constitutes the chr19 ZNF tail accounting for the majority of human KRAB-ZNFs.

architecture.internal_structure: ~25-30 KRAB-ZNF paralog genes in tandem at 90-98% identity over ~2.5 Mb; intra-cluster SDs of 10-80 kb; same conserved KRAB-A / ZF-array motifs as 19q13.31 driving cross-mapping; partial GRCh38 assembly issues.
